output.sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
SELECT ?person ?personLabel ?count WHERE {
  ?person p:P1339 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P1339 wd:Q513 ; pq:P2175 ?count .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?person rdfs:label ?personLabel
    FILTER(LANG(?personLabel) = "en")
  }
}
ORDER BY DESC(xsd:integer(?count))
LIMIT 10

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT ?person ?personLabel ?count
WHERE {
  ?person p:P1980 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P1980 ?countValue ;
             pq:P1987 wd:Q513 .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?person rdfs:label ?personLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?personLabel) = "en")
  }
  BIND(xsd:integer(REPLACE(STR(?countValue), "[^0-9]", "")) AS ?count)
}
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 10
